mapper.sql: vt . id , vt.`name`, vt.pid, vt.`level`,vt.`dv_type`, vt.node_type, vt.create_by, vt.create_time, vt.template_type, vt.snapshot
mapper.select: SELECT vt.id, vt.`name`, vt.pid, vt.`level`, vt.`dv_type`, vt.node_type, vt.create_by, vt.create_time, vt.template_type, vt.SNAPSHOT, vt.use_count, vtcm.category_id, cor.time as `recent_use_time` FROM core_template vt LEFT JOIN core_template_category_relation vtcm ON vt.id = vtcm.template_id left JOIN core_workspace_recent_resource cor on cor.resource_type = 6 and vt.id = cor.resource_name ORDER BY vt.use_count ,vt.create_time DESC
SELECT id, `name`, `name` as lable, pid, `level`, `dv_type`, node_type, create_by, create_time, template_type, SNAPSHOT FROM core_template_category order by core_template_category.create_time desc

SELECT
FROM core_template vt LEFT JOIN core_template_category_relation vtcm on vt.id = vtcm.template_id where vtcm.category_id=#{categoryId} order by vt.create_time desc

SELECT count(1) FROM core_template vt LEFT JOIN core_template_category_relation vtcm ON vt.id = vtcm.template_id WHERE vt.NAME = #{templateName} AND vtcm.category_id IN
#{categoryId}

SELECT core_chart_view.* FROM core_chart_view WHERE core_chart_view.id in
#{viewId}

SELECT core_chart_view_snapshot.* FROM core_chart_view_snapshot WHERE core_chart_view_snapshot.id in
#{viewId}

SELECT DISTINCT core_dataset.* FROM core_dataset WHERE core_dataset.id in
#{dsId}

SELECT DISTINCT core_dataset_table.* FROM core_dataset_table WHERE core_dataset_table.dataset_group_id in
#{dsId}

SELECT DISTINCT core_dataset_field.* FROM core_dataset_field WHERE core_dataset_field.dataset_group_id in
#{dsId}

SELECT DISTINCT core_datasource.* FROM core_datasource inner join core_dataset_table on core_dataset_table.datasource_id = core_datasource.id WHERE core_dataset_table.dataset_group_id in
#{dsId}

SELECT core_datasource_sync_task.* FROM core_datasource_sync_task INNER JOIN core_datasource ON core_datasource_sync_task.ds_id = core_datasource.id INNER JOIN core_dataset_table ON core_dataset_table.datasource_id = core_datasource.id WHERE core_dataset_table.dataset_group_id in
#{dsId}
SELECT core_visualization_linkage.* FROM core_visualization_linkage WHERE core_visualization_linkage.dv_id = #{dvId}

SELECT core_visualization_linkage_field.* FROM core_visualization_linkage_field INNER JOIN core_visualization_linkage ON core_visualization_linkage.id = core_visualization_linkage_field.linkage_id WHERE core_visualization_linkage.dv_id = #{dvId}
SELECT core_visualization_jump.* FROM core_visualization_jump WHERE core_visualization_jump.source_dv_id = #{dvId}

SELECT core_visualization_jump_action.* FROM core_visualization_jump_action INNER JOIN core_visualization_jump ON core_visualization_jump.id = core_visualization_jump_action.link_jump_id WHERE core_visualization_jump.source_dv_id = #{dvId}

SELECT core_visualization_jump_target.* FROM core_visualization_jump_target INNER JOIN core_visualization_jump_action ON core_visualization_jump_target.link_jump_info_id = core_visualization_jump_action.id INNER JOIN core_visualization_jump ON core_visualization_jump.id = core_visualization_jump_action.link_jump_id WHERE core_visualization_jump.source_dv_id = #{dvId}
SELECT core_visualization_linkage_snapshot.* FROM core_visualization_linkage_snapshot WHERE core_visualization_linkage_snapshot.dv_id = #{dvId}

SELECT core_visualization_linkage_field_snapshot.* FROM core_visualization_linkage_field_snapshot INNER JOIN core_visualization_linkage_snapshot ON core_visualization_linkage_snapshot.id = core_visualization_linkage_field_snapshot.linkage_id WHERE core_visualization_linkage_snapshot.dv_id = #{dvId}
SELECT core_visualization_jump_snapshot.* FROM core_visualization_jump_snapshot WHERE core_visualization_jump_snapshot.source_dv_id = #{dvId}

SELECT core_visualization_jump_action_snapshot.* FROM core_visualization_jump_action_snapshot INNER JOIN core_visualization_jump_snapshot ON core_visualization_jump_snapshot.id = core_visualization_jump_action_snapshot.link_jump_id WHERE core_visualization_jump_snapshot.source_dv_id = #{dvId}

SELECT core_visualization_jump_target_snapshot.* FROM core_visualization_jump_target_snapshot INNER JOIN core_visualization_jump_action_snapshot ON core_visualization_jump_target_snapshot.link_jump_info_id = core_visualization_jump_action_snapshot.id INNER JOIN core_visualization_jump_snapshot ON core_visualization_jump_snapshot.id = core_visualization_jump_action_snapshot.link_jump_id WHERE core_visualization_jump_snapshot.source_dv_id = #{dvId}
